failure.detail: deasync native module (node-gyp 4.0) fails to compile on ARM64 macOS across Node 16/18/23. parcel demo server crashes on missing deasync.node binding.

notes: Deploy failed: deasync dependency requires native compilation via node-gyp 4.0 which is incompatible with ARM64 macOS (Apple Silicon). Tried Node 16/18/23, all fail. --ignore-scripts skips build but parcel crashes at runtime needing deasync.node.
